title: Understanding the organization and its context
plainEnglishExplanation: Understand internal and external issues that could affect your business and QMS.
requirementSummary: Determine internal and external issues relevant to the organisation’s purpose and strategic direction.

title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
plainEnglishExplanation: Identify stakeholders and understand what they need or expect from you.
requirementSummary: Identify interested parties and their relevant needs and expectations.

title: Determining the scope of the quality management system
plainEnglishExplanation: Clearly define what parts of the business the QMS applies to.
requirementSummary: Define and maintain the scope of the QMS considering context and interested parties.

title: Quality management system and its processes
plainEnglishExplanation: Define, manage and improve your key business processes.
requirementSummary: Establish, implement, maintain and improve QMS processes and their interactions.

title: Leadership and commitment – general
plainEnglishExplanation: Top management must actively lead and support the QMS.
requirementSummary: Demonstrate leadership and commitment to the QMS and its effectiveness.

title: Leadership and commitment – customer focus
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure customer requirements are understood and met.
requirementSummary: Demonstrate leadership and commitment to customer focus.

title: Establishing the quality policy
plainEnglishExplanation: Create a quality policy aligned with the business direction.
requirementSummary: Establish a quality policy appropriate to the organisation.

title: Communicating the quality policy
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure the quality policy is communicated and understood.
requirementSummary: Communicate, implement and maintain the quality policy.

title: Organizational roles, responsibilities and authorities
plainEnglishExplanation: Clearly assign responsibility and authority within the QMS.
requirementSummary: Assign and communicate organisational roles and responsibilities.

title: Actions to address risks and opportunities
plainEnglishExplanation: Identify risks and opportunities and plan actions to manage them.
requirementSummary: Determine risks and opportunities and plan actions.

title: Quality objectives and planning to achieve them
plainEnglishExplanation: Set measurable quality objectives and plan how to achieve them.
requirementSummary: Establish quality objectives and plans to achieve them.

title: Planning of changes
plainEnglishExplanation: Control changes to the QMS to avoid negative impacts.
requirementSummary: Plan and control changes to the QMS.

title: Resources – general
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure adequate resources are available for the QMS.
requirementSummary: Determine and provide resources needed for the QMS.

title: People
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure enough competent people are available.
requirementSummary: Provide people necessary for process operation.

title: Infrastructure
plainEnglishExplanation: Provide and maintain suitable facilities and equipment.
requirementSummary: Provide and maintain infrastructure.

title: Environment for the operation of processes
plainEnglishExplanation: Provide suitable working conditions.
requirementSummary: Manage the environment needed for processes.

title: Monitoring and measuring resources – general
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure measuring equipment is suitable and maintained.
requirementSummary: Provide monitoring and measuring resources.

title: Measurement traceability
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure measurements are traceable where required.
requirementSummary: Ensure measurement traceability.

title: Organizational knowledge
plainEnglishExplanation: Maintain knowledge needed to run processes.
requirementSummary: Determine and maintain organisational knowledge.

title: Competence
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure people are competent for their roles.
requirementSummary: Ensure competence through training or experience.

title: Awareness
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure people understand their role in quality.
requirementSummary: Ensure awareness of QMS, policy and objectives.

title: Communication
plainEnglishExplanation: Define what, when and how you communicate.
requirementSummary: Determine internal and external communications.

title: Documented information – general
plainEnglishExplanation: Maintain required QMS documentation.
requirementSummary: Maintain documented information for the QMS.

title: Creating and updating documented information
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure documents are properly created and updated.
requirementSummary: Ensure documented information is suitable and identified.

title: Control of documented information
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure documents are controlled and protected.
requirementSummary: Control documented information.

title: Operational planning and control
plainEnglishExplanation: Plan and control operations to meet requirements.
requirementSummary: Plan, implement and control operational processes.

title: Customer communication
plainEnglishExplanation: Communicate clearly with customers.
requirementSummary: Establish arrangements for customer communication.

title: Determining requirements for products and services
plainEnglishExplanation: Clearly understand customer and regulatory requirements.
requirementSummary: Determine requirements for products and services.

title: Review of requirements for products and services
plainEnglishExplanation: Confirm requirements before committing to supply.
requirementSummary: Review requirements prior to acceptance.

title: Changes to requirements for products and services
plainEnglishExplanation: Control changes to customer requirements.
requirementSummary: Ensure changes are reviewed and communicated.

title: Design and development of products and services
plainEnglishExplanation: Control design and development activities where applicable.
requirementSummary: Establish a controlled design and development process.

title: Control of externally provided processes, products and services
plainEnglishExplanation: Ensure suppliers meet requirements.
requirementSummary: Control externally provided processes and products.

title: Type and extent of control
plainEnglishExplanation: Apply supplier controls based on risk.
requirementSummary: Determine type and extent of supplier control.

title: Information for external providers
plainEnglishExplanation: Clearly communicate requirements to suppliers.
requirementSummary: Provide requirements to external providers.

title: Control of production and service provision
plainEnglishExplanation: Control how products and services are delivered.
requirementSummary: Carry out production/service provision under controlled conditions.

title: Identification and traceability
plainEnglishExplanation: Identify and trace outputs where required.
requirementSummary: Ensure identification and traceability.

title: Property belonging to customers or external providers
plainEnglishExplanation: Protect customer or supplier property.
requirementSummary: Care for customer or supplier property.

title: Preservation
plainEnglishExplanation: Protect products during processing and delivery.
requirementSummary: Preserve outputs.

title: Post-delivery activities
plainEnglishExplanation: Manage activities after delivery where required.
requirementSummary: Meet post-delivery requirements.

title: Control of changes
plainEnglishExplanation: Control changes during production or service delivery.
requirementSummary: Review and control changes.

title: Release of products and services
plainEnglishExplanation: Verify requirements are met before release.
requirementSummary: Release outputs only after verification.

title: Control of nonconforming outputs
plainEnglishExplanation: Prevent use or delivery of nonconforming outputs.
requirementSummary: Control nonconforming outputs.

title: Monitoring, measurement, analysis and evaluation – general
plainEnglishExplanation: Monitor and measure QMS performance.
requirementSummary: Determine what needs monitoring and measurement.

title: Customer satisfaction
plainEnglishExplanation: Monitor customer satisfaction.
requirementSummary: Monitor customer perceptions.

title: Analysis and evaluation
plainEnglishExplanation: Analyse data to evaluate QMS effectiveness.
requirementSummary: Analyse and evaluate performance data.

title: Internal audit
plainEnglishExplanation: Audit the QMS to ensure it works as intended.
requirementSummary: Plan and conduct internal audits.

title: Management review
plainEnglishExplanation: Top management must review QMS performance.
requirementSummary: Review QMS suitability and effectiveness.

title: General improvement
plainEnglishExplanation: Identify and implement improvement opportunities.
requirementSummary: Determine and select opportunities for improvement.

title: Nonconformity and corrective action
plainEnglishExplanation: Fix problems and prevent them recurring.
requirementSummary: Manage nonconformities and corrective actions.

title: Continual improvement
plainEnglishExplanation: Continually improve the QMS.
requirementSummary: Continually improve QMS effectiveness.
